description: Perform an erosion risk audit on the White River Muncie model to identify river cross-sections where the Maximum Channel Velocity exceeds 4.0 ft/s. Generate a CSV report at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/velocity_compliance_audit.csv listing only the failing cross-sections with headers 'River_Station', 'Max_Channel_Vel_fps', and 'Excess_fps' (Max - 4.0), sorted by River Station in descending order. Additionally, save a profile plot to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/velocity_profile_audit.png showing Max Channel Velocity versus River Station, including a horizontal reference line at the 4.0 ft/s limit.
